title: Solid Ores
description: This resource pack makes all kind of ores more visible!
body:
Makes ores more visible by adding a pure form of the material to the center of the ore's texture! Works with every ore - stone, deepslate and nether.

![Solid Ores preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4be72dc1d475cf5839fea0d947eb876412dfb99.png)
